Bug","color":"fef2c0","default":false,"description":null}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-11-08T06:23:36Z","updated_at":"2024-11-08T06:23:36Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"### Describe the issue:

GCC 14 reports three distinct ODR violations:

- [`NumPyOS_ascii_tolower` declaration](https://github.com/numpy/numpy/blob/v2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/common/numpyos.h#L54) conflicting [its definition](https://github.com/numpy/numpy/blob/v2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/common/numpyos.c#L419)
  - The declaration says that the input parameter is a `char` while the definition says it is an `int.
- [`arr_interp` declaration](https://github.com/numpy/numpy/blob/v2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/multiarray/compiled_base.h#L12-L13) has one parameter more than [the definition](https://github.com/numpy/numpy/blob/v2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/multiarray/compiled_base.c#L546-L547).
- [`arr_interp_complex` declaration](https://github.com/numpy/numpy/blob/v2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/multiarray/compiled_base.h#L14-L15) has one parameter more than [the definition](https://github.com/numpy/numpy/blob/v2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/multiarray/compiled_base.c#L716-L717).

### Reproduce the code example:

```python
N/A
```


### Error message:

```shell
../numpy-2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/common/numpyos.h:54:1: error: type of 'NumPyOS_ascii_tolower' does not match original declaration [-Werror=lto-type-mismatch]
   54 | NumPyOS_ascii_tolower(char c);
      | ^
../numpy-2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/common/numpyos.c:419:1: note: type mismatch in parameter 1
  419 | NumPyOS_ascii_tolower(int c)
      | ^
../numpy-2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/common/numpyos.c:419:1: note: type 'int' should match type 'char'
../numpy-2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/common/numpyos.c:419:1: note: 'NumPyOS_ascii_tolower' was previously declared here
../numpy-2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/multiarray/compiled_base.h:15:1: error: type of 'arr_interp_complex' does not match original declaration [-Werror=lto-type-mismatch]
   15 | arr_interp_complex(PyObject *, PyObject *const *, Py_ssize_t, PyObject *, PyObject *);
      | ^
../numpy-2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/multiarray/compiled_base.c:716:1: note: type mismatch in parameter 5
  716 | arr_interp_complex(PyObject *NPY_UNUSED(self), PyObject *const *args, Py_ssize_t len_args,
      | ^
../numpy-2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/multiarray/compiled_base.c:716:1: note: 'arr_interp_complex' was previously declared here
../numpy-2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/multiarray/compiled_base.h:13:1: error: type of 'arr_interp' does not match original declaration [-Werror=lto-type-mismatch]
   13 | arr_interp(PyObject *, PyObject *const *, Py_ssize_t, PyObject *, PyObject *);
      | ^
../numpy-2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/multiarray/compiled_base.c:546:1: note: type mismatch in parameter 5
  546 | arr_interp(PyObject *NPY_UNUSED(self), PyObject *const *args, Py_ssize_t len_args,
      | ^
../numpy-2.1.3/numpy/_core/src/multiarray/compiled_base.c:546:1: note: 'arr_interp' was previously declared here
```
```
